prompt: The static field is shared accidentally across test instances. What is the bug?
choices: Static fields cannot be incremented from instance methods
requestCount is static so it is shared by all instances; s1 and s2 both see the same count (3) rather than independent counts of 2 and 1
getCount() must be static to access a static field
handleRequest() should use synchronized to protect the counter
explanation: static fields belong to the class, not to any instance. All instances share the same requestCount. After s1.handleRequest() x2 and s2.handleRequest() x1, requestCount=3 for all instances. Both s1.getCount() and s2.getCount() return 3. Fix: make requestCount an instance field (remove static).
